Class WorkoutRoutine

java.lang.Object
com.lockedin.lockedin.model.entity.workout.WorkoutRoutine
public class WorkoutRoutine extends Object
Represents a workout routine with metadata and tracked sets per exercise.
Version:
1.0
Author:
LockedIn Team
